note.text: Collaborative ED safety plan with lethal-means counseling. Copy provided to patient at discharge; included in transition-of-care packet to outpatient BH.

encounters.title: Triage suicide screen (ASQ)
encounters.notes: 28-year-old presents to a general medical ED with severe insomnia and anxiety; chronic pain and recent job loss. Triage-time ASQ administered and captured as discrete data.

encounters.title: Derived risk tier — non-acute positive
encounters.notes: Screen classified as non-acute positive (wish to be dead + thoughts of suicide, no current ideation/plan). Risk tier surfaced on the trackboard.

encounters.title: Suicide-screening-status flag raised
encounters.notes: Suicide-screening-status flag set so the positive screen is visible across the care team and downstream views.

encounters.title: Role-routed task: BH consult / brief assessment
encounters.notes: Positive screen fires the Flag Risk → Clarify Risk transition: a role-routed task and behavioral-health consult request are generated from the pathway PlanDefinition.

encounters.title: Mitigation checklist — patient relocated to safe room
encounters.notes: Environmental-safety mitigation checklist completed; patient moved to a ligature-resistant room.

encounters.title: Suicide-precautions order signed
encounters.notes: Observation-level suicide precautions ordered with required provider signature.

encounters.title: Room cleared + belongings secured
encounters.notes: Room clearance checklist documented; personal belongings inventoried and secured.

encounters.title: Continuous 1:1 observation started
encounters.notes: 1:1 continuous observation initiated with time-stamped observation log and a documented observer assignment.

encounters.title: Brief Suicide Safety Assessment (BSSA)
encounters.notes: BSSA performed after the positive ASQ to clarify whether a full risk assessment is needed. (Tool TL-005 is planned — not yet a built SPiER Questionnaire.)

encounters.title: Full risk assessment — C-SSRS Full + SAFE-T framing
encounters.notes: Full risk assessment completed using the C-SSRS Full (Lifetime/Recent) within a SAFE-T framing. (C-SSRS Full is built; SAFE-T framing TL-006 is planned.)

encounters.title: Current risk level set (high) + risk condition coded
encounters.notes: Current suicide risk level set to high; a coded suicide-risk Condition and a longitudinal risk Flag are persisted.

encounters.title: Boarding reassessment cadence scheduled
encounters.notes: Patient boards in the ED awaiting an inpatient bed; a time-based reassessment cadence is scheduled from the reassessment PlanDefinition.

encounters.title: Reassessment — risk updated, precautions maintained
encounters.notes: Scheduled reassessment performed; updated risk recorded and precautions maintained, preserving prior values.

encounters.title: Collaborative Stanley-Brown safety plan
encounters.notes: Collaborative Stanley-Brown safety plan completed with the patient and stored as a CarePlan.

encounters.title: Safety plan versioned + provenance
encounters.notes: Safety plan retained with version history and Provenance for each revision.

encounters.title: Lethal-means counseling delivered
encounters.notes: Lethal-means counseling delivered and documented; means-safety actions (who/what/when/where) added to the care plan. (Tool TL-008 is planned.)

encounters.title: Discharge-readiness checklist (gating)
encounters.notes: Discharge readiness checklist completed; a blocking alert would have prevented discharge until safety planning and means counseling were on file.

encounters.title: After-visit summary + safety plan to patient
encounters.notes: Suicide-specific after-visit summary generated; printed/portal-delivered safety plan and discharge instructions provided to the patient.

encounters.title: Urgent outpatient BH referral + appointment request
encounters.notes: Urgent outpatient behavioral-health referral placed with an appointment request and a communication to the receiving provider. (Tool TL-009 is planned.)

encounters.title: Transition-of-care packet transmitted
encounters.notes: Suicide-specific transition-of-care packet (safety plan + risk summary + follow-up plan) transmitted to outpatient BH, with Provenance for delivery.

encounters.title: Confirm outpatient receipt of packet
encounters.notes: Awaiting confirmation that the receiving outpatient BH program received the transition packet and scheduled the appointment.

encounters.title: 24–48h caring-contact call scheduled
encounters.notes: First caring contact (24–48h post-discharge phone call) scheduled per the follow-up PlanDefinition; patient enrolled in the caring-contacts registry. (Tools TL-010 / TL-012 are planned.)

encounters.title: 7-day follow-up outreach + risk recheck
encounters.notes: 7-day follow-up outreach attempt with an updated risk check and care-plan review.

encounters.title: Overdue-follow-up escalation guard
encounters.notes: If a follow-up attempt is missed, the task transitions to overdue and a supervisor alert plus an escalated follow-up Flag fire automatically.
